MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
DAn Mulready, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Brian Schlesinger.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith, is present appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Susan Cummings, is present.
Attorney, Jeremy Reyes, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of October 14, 2008 is confirmed.
